sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34367" key="e)mpitua/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμπῑτῠάζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n34367.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be curdled</tr_>, of milk, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:5:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
